title: The 10th Victim
writer: Robert Sheckley, Tonino Guerra, Giorgio Salvioni
actors: Marcello Mastroianni, Ursula Andress, Elsa Martinelli
plot: In a future where a human vs. human "Big Hunt" is used as an alternative to war, a veteran huntress' plan to kill a "victim" for a major TV sponsorship deal is compounded by romance.
